name: String Parsing & Processing
description: Test CSV-like string parsing and data extraction
prompt:
Apa output dari kode Python berikut?

```python
csv_data = """nama,umur,kota
Andi,25,Jakarta
Budi,30,Bandung
Citra,22,Surabaya
Dewi,28,Jakarta"""

baris = csv_data.strip().split("\n")
header = baris[0].split(",")
data = [dict(zip(header, b.split(","))) for b in baris[1:]]

jakarta_count = sum(1 for d in data if d["kota"] == "Jakarta")
total_umur = sum(int(d["umur"]) for d in data)
print(f"{jakarta_count},{total_umur}")
```
